allow: Bash(grep -oE '\(Hi\\. I.{0,5}m Lucas\\.|A Builder\\.|Your brand deserves|sparkle-rotate|<svg [^>]*viewBox="0 0 24 24"\)')
Bash(grep -oE '\(Lucas Moraca|Boulder, CO|CS student at CU|CrossFit coach|2.{1,5}3 projects|mailto:[^"]*|>\(Email|LinkedIn|GitHub\)<\)')
Bash(grep -oE '\(Let.{0,5}s work together|Tell me about your project|id="contact-\(name|email|message\)"|>Send it<|name="contact|type="email"|rows="4"\)')
Bash(python -c "import sys; html = sys.stdin.read\(\); idx = html.find\('<svg viewBox=\\"0 0 1200 60\\"'\); print\(html[idx:idx+1500]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'\(AI training advisor|redline-app\\.com\)', html\); print\('FOUND' if m else 'NOT FOUND'\); print\('redline letters check:', 'aria-label=\\"redline\\"' in html\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); checks={'ChapterMade nav':'ChapterMade' in html, 'badge':'Trusted by 2,200' in html, 'headline':'Professional Composites' in html, 'gradient span':'Made Simple' in html, 'subcopy':'built by Greek life' in html, 'CTA primary':'Start Your Composite' in html, 'CTA outline':'See How It Works' in html, 'inter var':'chaptermade' in html.lower\(\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in checks.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); checks={'LiLo eyebrow':'Premium Branded Wholesale' in html, 'tagline':'Flow.' in html, 'headline span':'Branded' in html, 'your way':'your way.' in html, 'description':'premium branded fitness' in html, 'CTA1':'Browse Collections' in html, 'CTA2':'Request Quote' in html, 'oswald var':'lilo-display' in html, 'nunito var':'lilo-sans' in html}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in checks.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); checks={'Redline card title':html.count\('Redline'\)>=1, 'browser url bar':'redline-app.com' in html, 'wordmark aria-label':html.count\('aria-label=\\"redline\\"'\)>=2, 'composite frametype rendered':'Redline' in html and 'AI Training Advisor' in html}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in checks.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); checks={'CM description':'Self-serve composite platform' in html, 'LiLO description':'Wholesale storefront for' in html, 'flatirons on CM card':html.count\('/assets/flatirons.jpg'\)>=2, 'lilo 4 images':all\(f'/assets/lilo/{n}' in html for n in ['2135.webp', 'DW346.jpg', 'YB45.webp', '2198.jpg']\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in checks.items\(\)]")
